title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
